title: What it looks like to carry a win and stay the same man
caption:
Success will change you. The only question is which direction.

The first sign it's going wrong: the circle shrinks to people who affirm you. The man who would tell you the truth — you see him less.

Protect what built you. The morning chapter. The training. The prayer. Whatever was already true of you before the doors opened — guard it.

Keep the man who knew you before the win. One man who has no reason to manage you. Who will say the hard thing and still be there on a Thursday night.

And hold the platform with open hands. God gave it to steward, not to own.

"Before a downfall the heart is haughty, but humility comes before honor." — Proverbs 18:12

Save this if God's been opening doors. Send it to a brother who needs it.

#faith #christianmen #humility #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #thevision #christianity
